seo.title: JB's Boatworks — Alabama Boat Repair Shop
seo.description: Fast, honest boat repair across Alabama. Motor repair, electrical, fiberglass, and more. Founded by a boat lover who knows the water.

hero.headline: Started by a Boat Lover, Built for Boat Lovers
hero.subheadline: Jonathan Bennett started fixing boats because he couldn't find anyone who did it right. Two years later, he's the one Alabama boaters trust.

sections.heading: Our Story
sections.body:
JB's Boatworks was born in 2024 out of frustration and a whole lot of passion. Jonathan Bennett — known to everyone as JB — grew up fishing Alabama's lakes and rivers. He learned early that there's no feeling quite like being on the water, and no feeling worse than a motor that won't start.

At 22, JB couldn't find a shop that combined real technical skill with honest pricing and fast turnarounds. So he started one. What began with a specialty in older motors — the kind most shops turn away — has grown into a full-service operation. JB's handles everything from complete rebuilds to routine maintenance, and he's just as comfortable with a brand-new four-stroke as he is with a vintage two-stroke from the 70s.

We're based in Alabama, and whether you're on Smith Lake, Lake Martin, the Gulf Coast, or anywhere in between, we're here to get you back out there.

items.title: Honest Every Time
items.description: We tell you exactly what your boat needs and what it'll cost — before we start. No surprises, no upsells you didn't ask for.

items.title: Fast Turnarounds
items.description: Boat season doesn't wait. We work efficiently so you're not sitting on shore watching the summer go by.

items.title: Deep Technical Knowledge
items.description: Old motors, new motors — JB has worked on them all. If most shops turn it away, we take it on.

items.title: Local to Alabama
items.description: We know these waters. We know what Alabama boat owners deal with. That context makes us better at the job.

items.title: We Actually Care
items.description: This isn't a job — it's a passion. Every repair matters to us because we're boat lovers too.

services.name: Motor Repair & Rebuild
services.tagline: Old motors, new motors — we know them all.
services.shortDescription: Complete diagnosis, repair, and rebuild for outboard and inboard motors. JB's specialty is older motors most shops won't touch.
services.fullDescription:
Motor trouble is the number one reason boats end up sitting in driveways instead of on the water. At JB's, motor repair isn't just something we do — it's what we built the shop around.

We work on all outboard and inboard motors, across all brands and generations. JB has a particular expertise in older motors — vintage two-strokes, carbureted outboards, and engines from manufacturers that other shops have stopped supporting. If a shop told you your motor isn't worth fixing, bring it to us before you take their word for it.

Every repair starts with a full diagnosis. We'll tell you exactly what's wrong, what it'll cost to fix, and whether that's the right call given your motor's age and condition. No pressure, no surprise invoices.
services.approach: Full diagnostic first — always. We don't start turning wrenches until you've approved the scope and cost. We use OEM parts where available and quality aftermarket where it makes sense.
services.whoItsFor: Boat owners dealing with motors that won't start, run rough, overheat, or lose power. Especially good for owners of older boats whose motors most shops won't work on.
outcomes: Motor running clean with a documented diagnosis report
Honest assessment of long-term motor health
No work done without your approval
services.imageAlt: Outboard motor disassembled on a workshop bench

services.approach: Placeholder — systematic diagnosis with marine-grade replacement components.
services.whoItsFor: Boat owners with electrical gremlins — lights that flicker, electronics that won't power on, batteries that drain, or wiring that needs updating.

outcomes: Structurally sound and visually matched repair
Restored confidence in your hull's integrity

team.name: Jonathan Bennett
team.title: Owner & Lead Technician
team.bio: JB grew up fishing Alabama's lakes and rivers and taught himself to fix motors before he could legally buy his own boat. At 22, he turned that obsession into JB's Boatworks — a shop built on fast work, honest pricing, and a genuine love for getting boats back on the water.
team.imageAlt: Jonathan Bennett, owner of JB's Boatworks, smiling in the shop

testimonials.quote: JB fixed an old Evinrude motor that three other shops told me was junk. Runs better than it has in years. Kid knows his stuff.
testimonials.name: Mike T.
testimonials.title: Boat Owner

testimonials.quote: Fast, honest, and didn't try to upsell me on things I didn't need. Exactly what you want in a repair shop.
testimonials.name: Sarah K.
testimonials.title: Boat Owner

testimonials.quote: Brought my bass boat in with electrical issues nobody could figure out. JB had it diagnosed and fixed in two days. Impressive.
testimonials.name: Derek W.
testimonials.title: Boat Owner
